text: Being here, in this softly lit, almost sacred-seeming exhibition space, I am filled with a quiet anticipation. The surrounding relics, each telling tales of research and development, inspire in me a sense of awe for human curiosity and ingenuity. The juxtaposition of technology and reflective wall texts stirs a gentle nostalgia, while the visible focus on connection makes the space feel both isolated and full of promise. I feel like a contemplative witness to the unfolding dialogue between past and future, surrounded by the questions and answers only thought can offer.
